{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231744092932713B446C4043AB49"}"},"total":549},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7602049861560337214","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超级好看，超级好看的(๑•.•๑)而且他，他的实力不是刚开始很弱小，后面很强大，他是一开头就很强大那种，目前好像是和红樱组CP，不清楚，反正很甜_(:з」∠)_[偷笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769995334,"group_id":"7431796692715850814","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/YS0om3gp2Nq0c4821QEdKQKdSHw7pk/aaaWahjCwth","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8259530eb7d84c7482940b635634bb64~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791617&x-signature=9A8Y7Fsf8AYA7Y9%2FA7plUFKsnzo%3D","user_id":"3827836146431379","user_name":"☁️杳☁️"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3827836146431379","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7431796692715850814","book_info":{"abstract":"“嫌您速度太慢，系统签到奖励：【光之法则】”
“嫌您力量太弱，系统签到奖励：【毁灭·炎帝真意】”
“嫌您血条太脆，系统签到奖励：【浴火重生·不死神凰】”
“嫌你气运不足，系统签到奖励：【镇世·传国玉玺】”
………
穿越斩神世界，宁云发现自己成为了林七夜的同班同学，还觉醒了金手指。
令他万万没想到的是，自己的金手指居然是签到系统！
签到就能获得奖励！
宁云开局便获得了光之法则！
直到……
宁云忽然发现。
系统签到获得的奖励，都是它亲自到各个世界进行打卡签到然后偷回来的！
于是某一天。
宁云：“人皇幡来！请诸神进来一叙！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eeff00f08eb2bd8d52acd198b4db0dcc","author":"沐雪望月","author_id":"","book_id":"7431796692715850814","book_name":"斩神：让你摇人，你把祖龙摇来了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#402828","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1062,"name":"斩神衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1062&name=斩神衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7431796748013552190","read_count":"15229","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"545014"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.2","serial_count":"286","tags":"男频衍生,系统,穿越,同人,斩神衍生,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/887f944c22825cdc7d943385f4dcf384~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779443049&x-signature=5uKSkEMn07gsYH%2FaNKGd%2FqXV7MU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2981479755286318","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"26"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231744092932713B446C4043AB49"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwarded_coun
